languages.text: "Вот уж незадача... Ваша Светлость, я сейчас пошлю за красными мантиями, но они сильно заняты. Вы если найдете что можно отключить от энергопитания, то, может, и хватит мощности на лифт".
"Bad news, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I'll call for the red robes, but they're busy as can be. If you find something to switch off, maybe we'll get enough power to start the lift."
languages.original_text: "Вот уж незадача... Ваша Светлость, я сейчас пошлю за красными мантиями, но они сильно заняты. Вы если найдете что можно отключить от энергопитания, то, может, и хватит мощности на лифт".

traits.locale_text: "Ill news, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I'll call for the red robes, but they're busy as can be. If you find something to switch off, maybe we'll get enough power to start the lift."
"Ill news, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I'll call for the red robes, but they're busy as can be. If you find something to switch off, maybe we'll get enough power to start the lift."
"Bad news, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I'll call for the red robes, but they're busy as can be. If you find something to switch off, maybe we'll get enough power to start the lift."
"Bad news, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I'll call for the red robes, but they're busy as can be. If you find something to switch off, maybe we'll get enough power to start the lift."

languages.text: “不好，大人。我可以去叫红袍们来，可他们眼下忙得不可开交。您要是能关停某些设备，也许就有足够的电启动这电梯了。”
languages.original_text: "Bad news, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I'll call for the red robes, but they're busy as can be. If you find something to switch off, maybe we'll get enough power to start the lift."

traits.locale_text: “不好，大人。我可以去叫红袍们来，可他们眼下忙得不可开交。您要是能关停某些设备，也许就有足够的电启动这电梯了。”

languages.text: "Kötü bir haberim var {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Kırmızı cübbelileri çağıracağım ama epey meşguller. Bir şeyleri kapatabilirsek belki asansörü çalıştıracak kadar güç ayarlayabiliriz."
languages.original_text: "Bad news, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I'll call for the red robes, but they're busy as can be. If you find something to switch off, maybe we'll get enough power to start the lift."

traits.locale_text: "Kötü bir haberim var {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Kırmızı cübbelileri çağıracağım ama epey meşguller. Bir şeyleri kapatabilirsek belki asansörü çalıştıracak kadar güç ayarlayabiliriz."

languages.text: « Mauvaise nouvelle, Votre Seigneurie. Je vais appeler les robes rouges, mais elles sont déjà débordées. Si vous trouvez quelque chose à éteindre, nous aurons peut-être assez de courant pour démarrer l'ascenseur. »
languages.original_text: "Bad news, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I'll call for the red robes, but they're busy as can be. If you find something to switch off, maybe we'll get enough power to start the lift."

traits.locale_text: « Mauvaise nouvelle, Votre Seigneurie. Je vais appeler les robes rouges, mais elles sont déjà débordées. Si vous trouvez quelque chose à éteindre, nous aurons peut-être assez de courant pour démarrer l'ascenseur. »

languages.text: «Malas noticias, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Llamaré a los de la túnica roja, pero están muy ocupados. Si encuentra algo que desconectar, tal vez consigamos energía suficiente para el ascensor».
languages.original_text: "Bad news, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I'll call for the red robes, but they're busy as can be. If you find something to switch off, maybe we'll get enough power to start the lift."

traits.locale_text: «Malas noticias, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Llamaré a los de la túnica roja, pero están muy ocupados. Si encuentra algo que desconectar, tal vez consigamos energía suficiente para el ascensor».

languages.text: "Schlechte Neuigkeiten, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Ich rufe die Roten Roben, aber sie sind ziemlich beschäftigt. Wenn Ihr etwas anderes ausschalten könnt, haben wir vielleicht genug Energie für den Aufzug."
languages.original_text: "Bad news, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I'll call for the red robes, but they're busy as can be. If you find something to switch off, maybe we'll get enough power to start the lift."

traits.locale_text: "Schlechte Neuigkeiten, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Ich rufe die Roten Roben, aber sie sind ziemlich beschäftigt. Wenn Ihr etwas anderes ausschalten könnt, haben wir vielleicht genug Energie für den Aufzug."

languages.text: 「悪い知らせです、{mf|閣下|閣下}。赤衣の連中を呼びはしますが、奴らは手いっぱいでして。何か切れるものを見つけてくだされば、昇降機を動かすだけの電力が確保できるかもしれません」
languages.original_text: "Bad news, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I'll call for the red robes, but they're busy as can be. If you find something to switch off, maybe we'll get enough power to start the lift."

traits.locale_text: 「悪い知らせです、{mf|閣下|閣下}。赤衣の連中を呼びはしますが、奴らは手いっぱいでして。何か切れるものを見つけてくだされば、昇降機を動かすだけの電力が確保できるかもしれません」
